title: Glob schemas dynamically in lib/validate.ts
acceptance_criteria: reference-impl/lib/validate.ts no longer hardcodes SCHEMA_FILES as a string array
All .schema.json files under @cloverleaf/standard/schemas/ are discovered dynamically via fs.readdirSync (filter to files ending in .schema.json)
Existing validate.test.ts test suite continues to pass without changes
Full reference-impl test suite (npm test) remains at 54 passing tests
